title: Laser Cooling: Preparing Ions for Quantum Operations
description: Learn the techniques used to cool trapped ions to near their quantum ground state of motion, from Doppler cooling to sideband cooling, essential for high-fidelity quantum gates.
learningObjectives: Explain the principle of Doppler cooling and the Doppler temperature limit
Understand resolved sideband cooling for ground state preparation
Calculate cooling rates and final temperatures
Describe sympathetic cooling for multi-species chains
